listitem.para: Specify the cryptographic algorithms to be negotiated as part of establishing phase2= Child (IPsec) SA. For a detailed description of the proposal syntax see the Proposals section.
Instead of specifying both phase2= and phase2alg=, the parameters ah= and esp= can be used to directly specify the Child (IPsec) SA's protocol and cryptographic algorithms.

Historic note: the term Phase 2 dates back to the original &IKEv1; specificiation where the Child (IPsec) SA was established using a second (Phase 2) exchange; since &IKEv2; can establish a Child SA during the initial exchange the term no longer applies.
History: ah= and esp= were made fully functional in &Libreswan; 5.3, prior to this they were aliases for phase2alg=.
